content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Information Graph". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/466/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains two integers n and m. Each of the next n lines contains a string si. Each of the next m lines contains two integers ai and bi.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print the result of the query.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a graph data structure to store the information and then use DFS or BFS to solve the queries.
